name: AECOM
description: AECOM is a leading global infrastructure consulting firm that provides professional services throughout the project lifecycle, including planning, design, engineering, consulting, and construction management. The company serves clients in various sectors such as transportation, facilities, environmental, energy, water, and government. AECOM is renowned for its expertise in delivering complex, large-scale projects that address some of the world's most significant challenges, from sustainable urban development to resilient infrastructure. Headquartered in Dallas, Texas, the firm operates across more than 150 countries, leveraging its technical excellence and innovative solutions to create a better world.
